B

BaseAssetsJettyPlugin - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.web.jetty.resources
Base class for request handlers that serve up file resources.

BaseFilterJettyPlugin - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.web.jetty.resources
Base class for request handlers that filter requests and then pass them on to other request handlers and finally servlets.

BaseJettyRequestHandler - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.web.jetty
Base class for all types of Jetty request handlers.
